name: Zucchini & Tomato Skillet
recipeIngredient: 1 large green pepper, cut into chunks
Italian or Cajun flavored if you like
use if your tomatoes are unseasoned
or you want some extra kick
recipeInstructions:
1. Slice and/or chop the zucchini (peel and deseed, if desired; I usually don't). Heat a nonstick skillet sprayed with cooking spray, or add a tablespoon or two of olive or canola oil.
2. Add onion and cook until it begins to soften.
3. Add zucchini and peppers and a little water. Cover the skillet and steam until zucchini begins to soften, about 10-15 minutes.
4. Stir in remaining ingredients. If tomatoes are juicy enough, omit beef broth and use chicken or vegetable broth, plain water, or tomato juice instead.
5. Make sure there is enough liquid in the skillet to cook the rice. Cover and simmer another 10-15 minutes or until rice is cooked.
6. To make a meal, add cooked (or sautéed with onion) ground beef, turkey, chicken pieces, chopped hot dogs, or pasta instead of rice. This recipe can also be made without rice.
